items.special_treatment: Enzyme stabilization with CaCl2 (0.2–0.8 mmol/L) is critical for reproducibility. Lyophilized enzyme requires reactivation by equilibration in buffer for several hours before use. All activity measurements performed in triplicate. Storage at -20°C in 10 mmol/L TEA–HCl, pH 7.5, with 50% glycerol is optimal for long-term stability.
items.temperature_control: Temperature controlled using a spectrophotometer with a temperature-controlled slide and external thermocoupled thermometer. Stability studies performed at 0–40°C (Thermomixer comfort, Eppendorf).
items.type: Batch stirred tank reactor (semi-micro cuvettes, 1 mL total volume) for spectrophotometric assays.
